# CWE-184 negative: allowlist of permitted filter tokens (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-184-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"regexp"
)

var allowedClause = regexp.MustCompile(`^[a-z0-9_]{1,32}$`)

// CWE-184 Incomplete List of Disallowed Inputs (mitigated)
func FilterStatement(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	clause := r.FormValue("clause")
	if !allowedClause.MatchString(clause) {
		http.Error(w, "blocked", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"accepted": clause})
}
